Headline: Blue Line Experiencing Delays; Boarding change between Harlem (O'Hare Branch) and Rosemont
ShortDescription: Board all Blue trains on the Forest Park-bound side at Harlem (O'Hare Branch), Cumberland and Rosemont due to a track condition near Cumberland.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line trains are running with significant delays due to a track condition near Cumberland.

Trains, in both directions, are running on the same track between Harlem (O'Hare Branch) and Rosemont stations.

Board/exit all trains on the Forest Park-bound side of the platform at Harlem (O'Hare Branch), Cumberland and Rosemont.

  • Shuttle buses between O'Hare and Jefferson Park, in both directions, has concluded.

We're working to restore normal service as quickly as possible.

Allow extra travel time.
